= rpk cluster partitions move-cancel
:description: Cancel ongoing partition movements. By default, this command cancels all the partition movements in the cluster.
:page-aliases: reference:rpk/rpk-cluster/rpk-cluster-partitions-movement-cancel.adoc
:page-platforms: linux,darwin

// This content is autogenerated. Do not edit manually. To customize content, see the writer's guide: https://github.com/redpanda-data/docs-extensions-and-macros/blob/main/docs-data/RPK_OVERRIDES_GUIDE.adoc

// tag::single-source[]
Cancel ongoing partition movements.

By default, this command cancels all the partition movements in the cluster. 
To ensure that you do not accidentally cancel all partition movements, this 
command prompts users for confirmation before issuing the cancellation request. 
You can use "`--no-confirm`" to disable the confirmation prompt:

[,bash]
----
rpk cluster partitions move-cancel --no-confirm
----

If "`--node`" is set, this command will only stop the partition movements 
occurring in the specified node:

[,bash]
----
rpk cluster partitions move-cancel --node 1
----

== Usage

[,bash]
----
rpk cluster partitions move-cancel [flags]
----



== Aliases

[,bash]
----
rpk cluster partitions alter-cancel
----

== Flags

[cols="1m,1a,2a"]
|===
|Value |Type |Description

|--no-confirm |bool |Disable confirmation prompt.
|--node |int |ID of a specific node on which to cancel ongoing partition movements.
|===

== Global flags

[cols="1m,1a,2a"]
|===
|Value |Type |Description

|--config |string |Redpanda or `rpk` config file; default search paths are `/Users/jakecahill/Library/Application Support/rpk/rpk.yaml`, `$PWD/redpanda.yaml`, and `/etc/redpanda/redpanda.yaml`.
|-X, --config-opt |stringArray |Override `rpk` configuration settings; `-X help` for detail or `-X list` for terser detail.
|--ignore-profile |bool |Ignore `rpk.yaml` and `redpanda.yaml`; use default settings.
|--profile |string |`rpk` profile to use.
|-v, --verbose |bool |Enable verbose logging.
|===

// end::single-source[]
